info.title: BlogSmith
info.description: Local agentic blogging service — a 9-stage LangGraph pipeline (Discovery → Research → Outline → Draft → Critique → review gate → Finalize → Visuals → Distribute) that writes human-like, SEO-strong posts with Gemini image generation. SQLite store, no auth, no cloud.

schema.title: Response Draft Preview Tools Draft Post
Response Preview Image Tools Preview Image Post

get.description: Download this site's current config as an editable CSV template.

post.description: Apply a config CSV. ``name`` and ``domain`` are locked and never changed.

schema.title: Response List Runs Sites  Site Id  Runs Get

get.description: Download the bulk-topics CSV template (topic, primary_keywords, expert_insights).

post.description: Queue one blog run per row of an uploaded topics CSV.

schema.title: Response Create Runs Csv Sites  Site Id  Runs Csv Post

post.description: Stop a run that's queued, in progress, or awaiting review.
Push the finished post's .mdx to the Field Notes API (per-site target, else .env).

publish_enabled.title: Publish Enabled
publish_enabled.description: True when Field Notes publishing is configured.

AuthorConfig.title: AuthorConfig
AuthorConfig.description: Byline written into the MDX frontmatter (and JSON-LD author).

brand_voice.title: Brand Voice
brand_voice.description: Global voice/tone rules applied to every stage.

CustomPrompts.title: CustomPrompts
CustomPrompts.description:
Per-stage prompt additions layered onto the authored defaults.

Each field, when set, is appended to that stage's system prompt. Leave blank
to use BlogSmith's default behaviour for that stage.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Publish this site's posts to its own endpoint.

api_url.title: Api Url
api_url.description: Field Notes endpoint for this site.

PublishConfig.title: PublishConfig
PublishConfig.description:
Per-site Field Notes publishing target. Each site/app can point at a
different endpoint with its own token (overrides the global .env default).

PublishOut.title: PublishOut
PublishOut.description: Result of pushing a post to the Field Notes API.

topic.title: Topic
topic.description: Skip Discovery and write this exact topic.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Freeform guidance for this single post.

expert_insights.title: Expert Insights
expert_insights.description: Optional war story / real numbers / contrarian take to weave in (the E-E-A-T layer).

auto_approve.title: Auto Approve
auto_approve.description: Skip the email gate (testing / trusted automation).

RunDecision.title: RunDecision
RunDecision.description: The human review decision, submitted from the dashboard at the gate.

mdx.title: Mdx
mdx.description: Full .mdx file (frontmatter + body) for the target app.

RunResult.title: RunResult
RunResult.description: The publishable output, pulled from the run's `final`/`visuals`/`distribution` slices.

image_style.title: Image Style
image_style.description: Visual style guidance for generated images.

default_tags.title: Default Tags
default_tags.description: Tags always added to this site's posts.

approval_email.title: Approval Email
approval_email.description: Where draft approval emails go (defaults to account email).

image_style.title: Image Style
image_style.description: Visual style guidance for generated images.

default_tags.title: Default Tags
default_tags.description: Tags always added to this site's posts.

approval_email.title: Approval Email
approval_email.description: Where draft approval emails go (defaults to account email).
